parameters.jsCode:
const answer = $json.message?.content || 'Sorry, I could not generate a response.';
return { json: { answer, sources: [] } };

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vector: $json.embedding || [], top: 5, with_payload: true, score_threshold: 0.5 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'alibayram/erurollm-9b-instruct', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $json.message } ], stream: false }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ duplicate: true, id: $json.id, filename: $json.filename, status: $json.status, chunks: $json.chunks, executionId: $execution.id, message: $json.message || 'Document already indexed' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, processing: true, id: $json.id, filename: $json.filename, collection: $json.collection, executionId: $execution.id, message: 'Document received – indexing in progress' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filter: { must: [{ key: 'doc_id', match: { value: $('Validate Input').first().json.id } }] } }) }}
